name: Number of Provinces
description: There are n cities. Some are connected directly, some indirectly, and some not at all. A province is a group of directly or indirectly connected cities. Given an n x n adjacency matrix isConnected, return the total number of provinces.
constraints: 1 <= n <= 200. n == isConnected.length. isConnected[i][j] is 0 or 1. isConnected[i][i] == 1. isConnected[i][j] == isConnected[j][i].
